name: Panthenol
lead: The pro-vitamin B5 form: water-soluble, well-tolerated, and converted in the skin to pantothenic acid — a cofactor in the synthesis of coenzyme A and downstream lipid metabolism. Modest, replicable, almost-never-failing. The ingredient that quietly improves the formula it lives in.

whatItIs.body: anthenol is the alcohol pro-form of pantothenic acid (vitamin B5). On contact with skin tissue it is enzymatically converted to pantothenic acid, which is a cofactor in coenzyme A synthesis — a central node in fatty-acid metabolism, ceramide assembly, and inflammatory signalling. The cosmetic effect is dual: humectant on the surface, metabolic support inside the keratinocyte.

mechanism.b: Hygroscopic; binds water at the corneocyte surface and improves skin feel immediately.
Pantothenic acid is rate-limiting for CoA synthesis; downstream effects on lipid assembly and barrier repair.
Modest effect on erythema and itch; replicated in mild eczema and post-procedure cohorts.

evidence.note: 5% panthenol reproducibly reduces TEWL and improves stratum-corneum hydration.
Comparable or superior to petrolatum on healing endpoints in superficial wounds.
Real reduction; pairs naturally with niacinamide and ceramides.
Not the role. Supporting ingredient, not a wrinkle tool.

concentration.b: Most cosmetics live here. Adequate humectant role.
Where the post-procedure and barrier data lives.
Wound and nappy-rash treatment. Same molecule, intentional dose.

pairings.note: Two complementary humectants; the standard 'B5 + HA' duo for a reason.
Panthenol supports lipid synthesis upstream; ceramides supply lipids directly. Combine.
Panthenol-led moisturiser blunts retinoid onboarding without compromising efficacy.
Both anti-inflammatory and barrier-restoring. Layer freely.

products.name: Cicaplast Baume B5
products.note: 5% panthenol + madecassoside + zinc. The reference post-procedure cream.

products.name: Sensiderm Cream
products.note: Pharmacy-grade, pure-functional formulation. Eczema-prone skin staple.

products.name: Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5
products.note: B5 supports the HA layer. Honest, cheap, useful.

products.name: Liquid Gold
products.note: Ceramide + cholesterol + B5 in physiologic ratio. Quietly excellent.

faq.q: Is panthenol the same as vitamin B5?
faq.a: It is the alcohol pro-form. Once on skin it is converted to pantothenic acid (true B5). The two terms are used interchangeably in cosmetic copy.

faq.q: Will it heal an active wound?
faq.a: It supports healing — reproducibly — but for an open wound, talk to a clinician. Bepanthen is the regulated wound product; Bepanthol-class cosmetics are for intact skin.

faq.q: Does it actually do anything, or is it filler?
faq.a: It is functional, not filler. The role is supporting. Panthenol does not transform skin on its own; it makes every formula it sits in measurably more comfortable and recovery-friendly.
Yes. One of the few actives that is uncontroversially safe across pregnancy and lactation.
